content: The 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory framework can be augmented with a dynamic curiosity-gated memory consolidation mechanism adapted from 2025 meta-learning agent systems, where only high-curiosity, out-of-distribution active learning queries are prioritized for long-term consolidation to avoid catastrophic forgetting during few-shot task adaptation. This creates a self-tuning memory pipeline that aligns what the agent actively chooses to learn with what it retains for future meta-learning tasks.
